description.value: Aura strong enchantment; CL 13th; Slot none; Price 57,200 gp; Weight 5 lbs. DESCRIPTION When the wielder of this hollow wooden staff speaks or shouts, it reverberates with the sound of her voice, lending a booming insistence to her words. It allows the use of the following spells: Suggestion (1 charge) Tongues (1 charge) Denounce (2 charges) Glibness (2 charges) Mass suggestion (4 charges) CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Staff; Spells denounce, glibness, mass suggestion, suggestion, tongues; Cost 28,600 gp.
